Dowload info kit

Start smiling with Invisalign

Please complete the fields below and receive your personal online Info kit. It will give you access to valuable information to help you on your way to the smile you've always wanted. Fields with * are compulsory

First name*:

Last name*:

Email address*:

Postcode*:

Country:

Where did you hear about Invisalign?*

I would like to receive special offers, product updates, and other information about Invisalign from AlignTechnology or from an Invisalign provider.

Gender:

Age range?

Thank you for providing your information. By clicking submit, you are requesting to receive the online Info Kit.


 

What is Invisalign?

Your confidence. Your outlook. Your life. With Invisalign, achieving the smile you always dreamed of doesn’t have to be a big deal. In fact, it barely has to impact your day-to-day life at all.

Invisalign straightens teeth using a series of nearly invisible, removable aligners that are custom-made specifically for your teeth. As you replace each aligner every two weeks, your teeth will move – little by little, week by week, gradually moving towards the projected final position.

Comfortable, clear and removable – Invisalign transforms your smile without disrupting your life something that more than 2.5 million people worldwide have already discovered.

Are you ready for your new smile?

Comfort through technologyVivera retainers are made with the same state-of-the-art technology as Invisalign.
RemovableVivera retainers are removable, helping you to maintain your overall oral hygiene and function.
Superior StrengthLab tests show that Vivera retainers are up to 30% stronger* when compared to other leading clear retainer Materials. This is a critical quality for keeping your smile in its final position.
Clean & ClearClear retainers can get dull and dirty over time. With Vivera retainers you receive three sets of retainers so you can switch to a clean and fresh one every few months.
Roll over for more information

REQUEST A CONSULTATION

(*) Required fields

Copley Dental Office Hours

For your convenience, we are open six days a week, and provide 24-hour emergency dental care.
Call us at to schedule your next appointment

Monday9 a.m. to 6 p.m.
Tuesday9 a.m. to 6 p.m.
Wednesday9 a.m. to 6 p.m.
Thursday9 a.m. to 6 p.m.
Friday9 a.m. to 6 p.m.
Saturday9 a.m. to 1 p.m.
